Sent: Thursday, November 15, 2007 1:58:41 PM
Subject: Fwd: Quote for Armored Suburban B6 / Larry Visoski


B6 level suburban's White Sliver or Black,
these look interesting.
 






See what's new at AOL.com and Make AOL Your Homepage.


-----Inline Message Follows-----

Dear Larry,

Thanks for your inquiry.    

We have  3 brand new level  B6  Suburbans (will stop AK-47)  made to the
exact same specification as The U.S  State department requires.

Price is  $110,000      This car may be sold at any day,  offer may change
or cancelled at any time without prior notice.  

Shipping & insurance to a U.S Destination - Included.

These cars are ready and available for immediate delivery.  The attached
pictures is for the Black one,  we have 3 left 
for immediate delivery : Black,  White & Silver.

  
Best regards,
Ron Lieberman
Black Armor
Tel.  1-310-704-1528
